'''kanoho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zehnbein|zehnbein]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-n-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zehnbein|zehnbein]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| kanoho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kæneheth|kæneheth]] || [[word:kænehej|kænehej]] || [[word:kænehesh|kænehesh]] || [[word:kænehe|kænehe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kanonohoth|kanonohoth]] || [[word:kanonohoj|kanonohoj]] || [[word:kanonohosh|kanonohosh]] || [[word:kanonoho|kanonoho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kanohoth|kanohoth]] || [[word:kanohoj|kanohoj]] || [[word:kanohosh|kanohosh]] || [[word:kanoho|kanoho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kanofhoth|kanofhoth]] || [[word:kanofhoj|kanofhoj]] || [[word:kanofhosh|kanofhosh]] || [[word:kanofhof|kanofhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kanohotho|kanohotho]] || [[word:kanohojo|kanohojo]] || [[word:kanohosho|kanohosho]] || [[word:kanohoko|kanohoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kanohoth|kanohoth]] || [[word:kanohoj|kanohoj]] || [[word:kanohosh|kanohosh]] || [[word:kanoho|kanoho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kanohothol|kanohothol]] || [[word:kanohojol|kanohojol]] || [[word:kanohoshol|kanohoshol]] || [[word:kanohokol|kanohokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kanohothotho|kanohothotho]] || [[word:kanohojojo|kanohojojo]] || [[word:kanohoshosho|kanohoshosho]] || [[word:kanohoko|kanohoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kanohothon|kanohothon]] || [[word:kanohojon|kanohojon]] || [[word:kanohoshon|kanohoshon]] || [[word:kanohokon|kanohokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kanohothoro|kanohothoro]] || [[word:kanohojoro|kanohojoro]] || [[word:kanohoshoro|kanohoshoro]] || [[word:kanohokoro|kanohokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|8d63c8d}}
